purpose: Convert valuation from a single target price into a multi-layer decision battlefield.
core_motto: 宏观定仓位 · 估值定胜率 · 财报定去留 · 周期定时机 · 期权定下限

S1_macro_constraint.question: 当前宏观环境允许多大Beta和仓位？
S1_macro_constraint.decision_role: Sets position ceiling, not target price.

outputs.risk_ceiling_note: why macro allows or restricts aggression

hard_rules: If macro crisis mode, no single stock can justify full aggression.
If rates rise because growth is strong, impact differs from rates rising because fiscal stress is worsening.
Macro is a constraint layer, not a stock thesis.

S2_intrinsic_value.question: 这家公司在保守/中性/乐观现金流下值多少钱？
S2_intrinsic_value.decision_role: Defines safety margin and core-position legitimacy.
hard_rules: SBC must be treated as real cost.
FCF quality matters more than non-GAAP optics.
If business quality breaks, valuation cheapness is not enough.

S3_market_consensus.question: 华尔街共识正在上修还是下修？
S3_market_consensus.decision_role: Determines whether the market is moving toward or away from the thesis.
hard_rules: EPS revision trend matters more than headline P/E.
A stock can get cheaper for the wrong reason.
Guidance quality is more important than last quarter beat.

S4_narrative_value.question: 市场正在给它多少未来？这个未来是否仍被相信？
S4_narrative_value.decision_role: Explains why market price can exceed intrinsic value during powerful cycles.
hard_rules: Narrative is not truth; it is what the market is willing to discount.
State-level strategic narratives have longer duration than social-media hype.
If price stops responding to good narrative news, narrative may be saturated.

S5_cycle_value.question: 这只股票处在产业/资金/价格周期的哪一段？
S5_cycle_value.decision_role: Determines whether valuation should be expanded, tolerated, compressed, or reset.
hard_rules: Cheap in late-cycle can still fall.
Expensive in early-cycle can keep expanding.
Timing determines whether correct thesis makes money.

S6_personality_value.question: 这只股票的股性允许多高溢价？它通常如何修正？
S6_personality_value.decision_role: Adjusts valuation tolerance by stock behavior DNA.
hard_rules: NVDA/TSLA/PLTR/CRDO-style names can trade above classical valuation longer than expected.
But personality premium must be monitored for exhaustion.
Do not use one stock's personality premium on another stock.

S7_extreme_risk_value.question: 极端上行/下行时，哪里是泡沫区、恐慌成熟区和强制出清区？
S7_extreme_risk_value.decision_role: Defines trim zones, panic buy zones, and invalidation zones.
hard_rules: Falling price alone is not panic maturity.
Rising price alone is not bubble.
Extreme zones need multi-factor resonance.

conditions: intrinsic value has margin of safety OR narrative/cycle is early with strong confirmation
prefer trim/sell-call first depending on user style

example_CRDO_placeholder.stock_identity: AI Infra / Optical / SerDes high-beta expansion stock
likely_key_questions: Is revenue growth accelerating enough to justify premium valuation?
Is AI CapEx chain still expanding?
Is CRDO becoming a durable leader or second-line beta?
Is current price driven by fundamentals, narrative, or gamma?
Where is the first real panic-buy zone if AI Infra corrects?
